mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunk ( id, tenant_id, document_id, chunk_index, modality, content_text, token_count, embedding_model, vector_id, metadata, gmt_create, embedding_status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{modality}, #{contentText}, #{tokenCount}, #{embeddingModel}, #{vectorId}, #{metadata}::jsonb, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, 0 )

insert into document_chunk(tenant_id, document_id, chunk_index, modality, content_text, token_count, embedding_model, vector_id, metadata, gmt_create, embedding_status, is_deleted) values
#{chunk.tenantId}, #{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.modality}, #{chunk.contentText}, #{chunk.tokenCount}, #{chunk.embeddingModel}, #{chunk.vectorId}, #{chunk.metadata}::jsonb, NOW(), 0, 0
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, document_id, chunk_index, modality, content_text, token_count, embedding_model, vector_id, metadata, gmt_create, embedding_status, is_deleted from document_chunk where document_id = #{documentId} and is_deleted = 0 order by chunk_index asc
mapper.update: UPDATE document_chunk SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, document_id, chunk_index, modality, content_text, token_count, embedding_model, vector_id, metadata, gmt_create, embedding_status, is_deleted FROM document_chunk WHERE embedding_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY gmt_create ASC LIMIT #{limit}
